headline: Nasdaq 100 Tumbles Over 3%, Marvell Crashes 12%: Stock Market Today
summary: The Nasdaq 100 sank 3.3% Tuesday as AI and optical stocks cratered, while cash rotated into real estate, staples and utilities and oil slid more than 5%
